title: GET /books — List all books with ?author= filter
GET /books/{id} — Get a single book by ID
Use specified language (Clojure) and framework (Ring/Reitit)
evidence: src/books/core.clj:1-46 uses Ring/Reitit for routing, deps.edn declares dependencies

title: Store data in SQLite with appropriate schema
evidence: src/books/db.clj:18-27 creates books table, all CRUD operations use next.jdbc

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: src/books/handlers.clj returns status codes (200, 201, 204, 400, 404), muuntaja middleware handles JSON encoding

title: Input validation (title and author required)
evidence: src/books/validation.clj:9-25 validates book payload, handlers use it in create/update, test/books/api_test.clj:58-64 verifies 400 response

title: Working source code in workspace directory
evidence: All source files present and functional, tests pass with 0 failures

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md:1-105 provides requirements, run, test, and API documentation

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: test/books/api_test.clj has 7 tests: health-check, create-and-get-book, validation-rejects-missing-fields, list-and-filter-by-author, update-book, delete-book, missing-book-returns-404
